title: Investigate Hidden File Security Alert (BitKeeper)
description:
A security scan flagged a sensitive file at `/BitKeeper` as accessible. The scan categorized this under OWASP A05 (Security Misconfiguration) and OWASP A06 (2017).

## Investigation

A thorough search of the entire codebase found no reference to 'BitKeeper' or 'BitKeeperAlert' in any source file. Accessing `https://app.datatoolspro.com/BitKeeperAlert` correctly returns a 302 redirect to the login page, indicating no actual file exists at that path. The alert appears to be a false positive, possibly triggered by an external JavaScript library or Cloudflare behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Codebase is searched for any BitKeeper references
The /BitKeeper URL correctly redirects to the login page (not serving content)
Finding is documented as investigated with no action required
implementation_notes: No BitKeeper reference found in the codebase after comprehensive search. The URL returns a 302 redirect to the login page. May originate from an external JavaScript library. Documented as investigated with no action needed.
comment_summary: Developer searched all folders and files but found no BitKeeper reference. The URL redirects to the not-found page. Product owner speculated it might come from an external JS library but confirmed no reference exists in source control.
